A0_norm_only.reason: Depends only on |q| = exp(a(omega)); blind to theta, phi, rho.

A1_full_quaternion_sigma.reason: Derivative term sees the full quaternion map.

A2_split_sigma.reason: Explicitly separates scale alpha and unit-quaternion orientation u.

A3_split_sigma_skyrme.reason: Adds a direct quartic stabilizer and a live topological avenue.

A4_curvature_scale_only.reason: Curvature coupling through the norm channel still remains angle-blind.

A5_curvature_split.reason: Potentially viable if curvature sees more than alpha, but tensor structure is not fixed yet.

A6_frame_connection.reason: Maurer-Cartan structure is present, but the direct action principle is not yet fixed.
